case_title: HAPPY MOOSE JUICE, INC. VS. WILLIAM KASEL et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $130.00) SERVED JUN-22-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KASEL, WILLIAM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2021 - JUDGMENT. COURT DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF HAPPY MOOSE JUICE, INC. REPRESENTED BY JORDAN CECERE, OWNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WILLIAM KASEL AND MEGAN KISTLER ARE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAPPY MOOSE JUICE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KASEL, WILLIAM KISTLER, MEGAN $4,064.50 PRINCIPAL, $310.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,374.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,064.60 FILED BY HAPPY MOOSE JUICE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KASEL, WILLIAM KISTLER, MEGAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-28-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PLAINTIFF HAPPY MOOSE JUICE, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JORDAN CERERE, PARTNER. DEFENDANT WILLIAM KASEL IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MEGAN KISTLER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-30-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. (W. TRUPEK, 506)
